name: Seafood Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Cooked shrimp, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large saucepan over low heat until melted.
2. Add garlic and stir in flour and salt. Cook, stirring constantly, until bubbly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in milk, broth, and white wine. Return to stove and heat until boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Boil for one minute, then stir in mozzarella, onions, basil, and pepper.
5. Cook over low heat until cheese is melted, stirring constantly.
6. Spread about 1 1/2 cups of the sauce in an ungreased 9X13 pan.
7. Top with uncooked lasagna noodles, overlapping as needed.
8. Spread cottage cheese over the noodles.
9. Spread with another 1 1/2 cups of sauce, and then with another 5 noodles.
10. Top with seafood (shrimp, scallops, crabmeat) and another round of sauce.
11. Add last 5 noodles and top with all remaining sauce.
12. If desired, top with 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese.
13. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until the noodles are tender. Let stand for 15 minutes before cutting.
Note: When measuring the last sauce, leave at least 1 1/2 cups for the top to avoid crispy noodle tips. Break noodles into smaller pieces if desired to create a complete layer.
